name: blender_mcp
description: Interact with Blender and studio pipeline tooling through MCP.

tool_name.description: Name of the Blender MCP tool to call

params.description: Parameters to pass to the tool

ai_generate_material.description: Generate material using AI from text description.

assign_material.description: Assign an existing material to an object by name.

assign_material_pbr.description: Assign a PBR material to an object.

auto_weight_paint.description: Automatically weight paint a mesh to an armature.

clear_scene.description: Remove scene objects while optionally preserving cameras and lights.

create_animation_curve.description: Create an animation curve with multiple keyframes.

create_animation_layer.description: Create an animation layer for non-destructive animation.

create_area_light.description: Create or replace an area light.

create_asset_pipeline.description: Create a new asset in the pipeline.

create_auto_rig.description: Create an automated rig for a character.

create_bsdf_material.description: Create or replace a Principled BSDF material.

create_camera.description: Create a camera in the scene.

create_composition_camera.description: Create or replace a composition camera.

create_control_rig.description: Create a control rig for animation.

create_emission_material.description: Create or replace an emission material.

create_empty.description: Create an empty object in the scene.

create_facial_animation.description: Create facial animation from audio or emotion curves.

create_glass_material.description: Create or replace a glass material.

create_isometric_camera.description: Create or replace an isometric camera.

create_job.description: Create a new async job for AI generation.

create_light.description: Create a light in the scene.

create_material_variations.description: Create variations of an existing material.

create_metal_material.description: Create or replace a metal material.

create_ocio_config_template.description: Create a basic OCIO config template file.

create_primitive.description: Create a primitive object in the scene.

create_procedural_texture.description: Create a material driven by a procedural texture node.

create_publish_pipeline.description: Create a new publish for an entity.

create_sequence.description: Create a new sequence in a project.

create_shot.description: Create a new shot in the production pipeline.

create_shot_pipeline.description: Create a new shot in the pipeline (durable storage).

create_shot_version.description: Create a new version of a shot.

create_sky_system.description: Create a physically accurate sky system.

create_studio_light_rig.description: Create a professional studio lighting rig.

create_studio_lighting.description: Create a named studio lighting preset.

create_subsurface_material.description: Create an advanced subsurface scattering material.

create_volume_material.description: Create a volume material for clouds, smoke, or fire.

create_volumetric_light_effect.description: Create volumetric lighting effects on a specific light.

create_weather_system.description: Create a weather system with particles and effects.

download_polyhaven_asset.description: Download and import a PolyHaven asset.

download_sketchfab_model.description: Download and import a Sketchfab model.

duplicate_object.description: Duplicate an object in the scene.

execute_blender_code.description: Execute arbitrary Python code in Blender.

export_glb.description: Export scene or selection to GLB format.

export_render_manifest.description: Export a render job manifest (JSON) for external runners or farm submission.

export_scene_bundle.description: Export a complete scene bundle for Next.js 16 integration.

export_usd_asset_package.description: Export an asset as a USD package.

export_usd_shot_package.description: Export a shot as a USD package.

frame_camera_to_selection.description: Frame the named camera to the current selection.

generate_hyper3d_model_via_images.description: Generate 3D model using Hyper3D from images.

generate_hyper3d_model_via_text.description: Generate 3D model using Hyper3D from text prompt.

generate_procedural_material.description: Generate a procedural material based on type and parameters.

generate_skeleton.description: Generate a skeleton based on mesh analysis.

generate_tripo3d_model.description: Generate a Tripo3D model from text or image input.

get_color_pipeline.description: Get the color pipeline configuration for a project.

get_job.description: Get the status of a job.

get_object_info.description: Get detailed information about a specific object.

get_publish_lineage.description: Get the lineage for a publish.

get_publish_manifest.description: Get the complete manifest for a publish.

get_scene_hash.description: Get a stable hash of the current scene state.

get_scene_info.description: Get detailed information about the current Blender scene.

get_selection.description: Get information about currently selected objects.

get_sequence.description: Get all shots in a sequence.

get_sketchfab_model_preview.description: Get preview thumbnail of a Sketchfab model.

get_tracker_shots.description: Get shots from the tracker for a sequence.

get_usd_package.description: Get a USD package by ID.

get_viewport_screenshot.description: Capture a screenshot of the current Blender 3D viewport.

import_job_result.description: Import the result of a completed job.

import_motion_capture.description: Import motion capture data to an armature.

list_cameras.description: List cameras in the active scene.

list_sequences.description: List all sequences in a project.

list_shots.description: List all shots, optionally filtered by sequence.

list_usd_variants.description: List variants for a USD package.

observe_scene.description: Observe the current scene state with configurable detail level.

optimize_render_settings.description: Optimize render settings for quality/time balance.

prepare_aces_render_outputs.description: Prepare render output configuration for ACES workflow.

push_publish_status.description: Push publish status to the tracker.

render_preview.description: Render a preview image of the scene.

retarget_animation.description: Retarget animation from one armature to another.

review_shot.description: Review and approve/reject a shot version.

rollback_publish.description: Rollback to a specific publish version.

set_camera_depth_of_field.description: Configure camera depth of field settings.

set_project_color_pipeline.description: Set the color pipeline configuration for a project.

set_texture.description: Apply a PolyHaven texture to an object.

set_transform.description: Set the transform of an object.

set_usd_variant_selection.description: Set the variant selection for a variant set.

setup_light_linking.description: Setup light linking for selective illumination.

setup_render_passes.description: Setup multiple render passes for compositing.

setup_render_settings.description: Configure render settings for the active scene.

setup_shot_camera.description: Setup camera for a specific shot.

setup_stereoscopic_render.description: Setup stereoscopic rendering for VR/3D content.

sync_project_context.description: Sync project context with the tracker.

sync_shot_context.description: Sync shot context with the tracker.

tag_texture_colorspace.description: Determine the appropriate colorspace for a texture.
